name: Fortinet FortiEDR
description: Integrates with FortiEDR Central Manager REST API for endpoint detection, threat hunting, collector management, and automated response actions

actions.name: List Security Events
actions.description: Retrieve security events from FortiEDR with filtering and pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity level (Critical, High, Medium, Low)

parameters.name: firstSeen
parameters.description: Start time filter for event creation (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: lastSeen
parameters.description: End time filter for event creation (ISO 8601)

actions.name: Get Event Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific security event

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the security event

actions.name: List Collectors
actions.description: Retrieve the list of FortiEDR collectors (agents) deployed across endpoints

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of collectors to return

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by collector state (Running, Disconnected, Disabled)

actions.name: List Collector Groups
actions.description: Retrieve the list of collector groups in the environment

actions.name: Isolate Collector
actions.description: Isolate one or more collectors from the network to contain threats

parameters.name: devices
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of device names to isolate

actions.name: Unisolate Collector
actions.description: Remove network isolation from one or more collectors

parameters.name: devices
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of device names to unisolate

actions.name: Threat Hunting Search
actions.description: Search endpoint telemetry for threat hunting using activity event types (process creation, file ops, registry, network)

parameters.name: from_time
parameters.description: Start time for the search window (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: to_time
parameters.description: End time for the search window (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Forensics Data
actions.description: Retrieve forensic data collected from endpoints including memory dumps and artifacts

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event ID associated with the forensic collection

actions.name: Update Event Classification
actions.description: Update the classification of a security event (mark as handled, false positive, etc.)

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the security event
